props.description: The ref for the element which the tooltip positions itself with respect to. When used within a TooltipTrigger this is set automatically. It is only required when used standalone.
Whether the tooltip is currently performing an entry animation.
Whether the tooltip is currently performing an exit animation.
The container element in which the overlay portal will be placed. This may have unknown behavior depending on where it is portalled to.
The placement of the tooltip with respect to the trigger.
